flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Texas College are 37% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.8k vs $53.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas College rose 79% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.3k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Texas College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (18.1% → 13.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Texas College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (644 vs 824).
